filesystem.description: Read, write, and manage local files and directories — file reads, writes, renames, deletions, search, and directory listings.

github.description: GitHub API integration — search repos, read issues/PRs, check CI, create releases, and manage repos.

tavily.description: Web search for up-to-date information — documentation, news, tutorials, and technical answers.

hostinger-dns.description: Hostinger DNS management — create, update, and delete DNS records for domains.

hostinger-hosting.description: Hostinger web hosting management — manage hosting plans, websites, and server resources.

hostinger-vps.description: Hostinger VPS management — create, manage, and monitor virtual private servers.

hostinger-domains.description: Hostinger domain management — search, register, transfer, and manage domain names.

sequential-thinking.description: Multi-step reasoning for complex planning — break down problems, evaluate approaches, and document trade-offs.

fetch.description: HTTP fetch tool — retrieve content from URLs for documentation, APIs, and web resources.

playwright.description: Browser automation — test web apps, take screenshots, fill forms, and verify UI behavior.

desktop-commander.description: Desktop command execution — run terminal commands, manage processes, and control the development environment.
